note: PARSER BASELINE (HYPOTHESIS — NOT a validated model). Every ⚑ below is an UNMEASURED estimate; hand-tune + record against a real fight before trusting any number. Remove this banner only when the unit has been measured/hand-tuned. || Zwei (`zwei`) — SG / Electric / Supporter / Burst I (20s); ammo 9, reloadFrames 111, hitsPerShot 10, normalMult 100.75, coreMult 200. Her VALUE is team buffs (crit rate + pierce damage); own SG output modest. Kit-parse AUTHOR pass 2026-07-16, merged from overrides-baselines/zwei.json. FULL-KIT AUDIT: S1 = FB-enter team Pierce Damage 20.13% 'for 1 round(s)' (dur 5 ⚑4 — round-scoped has no schema primitive; per-magazine reading) + 10.06%/10s (stated) — same-stat pair COEXISTS in the buff list (staged baseline DBG-verified, no same-caster-slot swallow) → additive 30.19 early FB; + per-Zwei-normal-attack-in-FB stacking Pierce Damage 24.99% x3 (shotFired + fbGate inFb; dur 5 ⚑4 round-scoped — dur must span her ~3s swap-cycle gap so consecutive swap shots chain her own stacks like real round-persistence). All pierceDamagePct: inert for non-Pierce allies but LIVE for Zwei HERSELF via hasPierce during her swap window, and feeds any pierce carrier (alice/red-hood/mari) — hard rule 3, never dropped. S2 = (a) 'after 5 normal attack(s)' → team heal event (shotFired everyN 5 → allies `heal`; hard rule 2). Kit heals COVER HP 7.52% — amount not modeled (heal is event-only); whether cover-HP recovery fires ally 'recovery' consumers (crown) is a HYPOTHESIS ⚑6. everyN on shotFired = per trigger PULL (correct for 'normal attack(s)'; hitCount 5 would wrongly count PELLETS = 2x/pull on hitsPerShot 10). (b) FB-enter team Crit Rate 18.63%/10s (fully live stat). (c) per-normal-attack team Crit Rate 15%/5s x3 gated 'while in Pierce Attacks 101 status' — that status = her OWN burst's team buff (10s from her B1 cast); no status-gate primitive → proxied shotFired + fbGate inFb ⚑5 (exact for a sole-B1 team where every FB follows her cast; real window starts ~2-3s earlier and ends ~7s into FB; multi-B1 teams would over-credit — trigger-fidelity rule 6 noted, not expressible). BURST = (a) self weaponSwap: charge cannon 50.69%/shot, chargeTimeSec 1.2, Full Charge 300% → 152.07%/full shot, maxAmmo 1; durationSec 10 est ⚑3 TOP (duration UNSTATED in text; RRH-class default). Swap economy ⚑3 TOP: engine sims text-faithful ~3 shots/window (1.2s charge + 1.85s base reload per 1-ammo mag; swap is bolt-gap-exempt + skips SG landing falloff, sim.ts 1531/1652); the RRH swap bias-correction optimistic bound is ~8 shots (reload-free, charge-gated 10/1.2) — NOT shipped because 'Max Ammunition Capacity: 1' is EXPLICIT kit text and the owner reverted an analogous invented unlimitedAmmo on arcana-fortune-mate (SG model pass 2026-07-16); if footage shows reload-free cadence, add {kind:'unlimitedAmmo',durationSec:10} to the swap block. noFb DEFAULT (prior 2 — swap shots landing in FB get +50%; no measured FB-OFF evidence). (b) team 'Pierce Attacks 101' = Pierce Damage 25.03%/10s (burstCast → allies; the named status itself is the S2c gate, see ⚑5). hasPierce:true — 'Additional Effect: Pierce' tags the SWAPPED cannon; no swap-scoped pierce primitive (pierceModes needs kit modes) → unit-wide flag, leakage ≈ 0 because every pierce buff in her kit is FB/burst-window-scoped, exactly when she is swapped ⚑7; engine gives SG NO pierce double-hit (sim.ts 1698) so the flag only feeds pierceDamagePct → her Damage Up (verbatim line kept in unmodeled per mari precedent — a flag is not a block). MANDATORY cadence ⚑1 (SG class pullsPerSec + reloadFrames 111 datamine; mag-empty ~6s, no implausibility tell). SG pellet landing per-unit ⚑2 (class SG_LANDING_BY_BAND shipped). No 'Hit Rate' line (hard rule 4 N/A); no currency/ramp mechanic beyond the x3 buff stacks; element ×1.10 clean (no elemental-code buff). SKIPPED lines: only 【Phase】/Items cost-progression flavor + the burst 'Cooldown: 20 s' (already burstCooldownSec 20 in char data) — zero hard-rule-class lines in unmodeled. NO recording yet — HYPOTHESIS.
caveats: burst: weapon-swap window economy is an unmeasured estimate — duration 10s (unstated in kit) and ~3 shots/window (charge 1.2s + 1-ammo reload); if footage shows reload-free cadence it is ~8 shots
skill1: 'for 1 round(s)' round-scoped buff durations approximated as 5s (no round primitive in the schema)
skill2: the Crit Rate stack's 'Pierce Attacks 101 status' gate is proxied by an in-Full-Burst gate — exact only when Zwei is the team's sole Burst I
skill2: the every-5-attacks heal recovers COVER HP in-kit; whether that fires teammates' on-recovery triggers is an unverified hypothesis
unit: pierce applies only to the swapped burst cannon in-kit; modeled as unit-wide hasPierce (her pierce buffs are burst-window-scoped, so spillover onto normal shotgun fire is minimal)
